description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build that runs in the build stage, uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/ercom/docker:18.03.1-ce-git and a docker:18.03.1-ce-dind service aliased as docker, sets the variables DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375, and executes the script ci-scripts/run-job-script.sh. The job should only run for tag pipelines (only tags) and be assigned the runner tag docker. No caches or artifacts are defined.
